about_page.subtitle: Cooks with what you have at home
about_page.desc_1: Want to cook simply, quickly, and with what's at home? Then welcome to our website!
about_page.desc_2: - an inventive assistant that will sort and find a recipe specifically for you and your wishes. Just tell it what ingredients you have, and it will quickly find something tasty for you.
about_page.desc_3: No stress in front of an empty fridge — only delicious ideas based on available products!
about_page.desc_4: Believe me, good food does not require complicated recipes, a lot of time, or exotic ingredients!
about_page.desc_5: It is enough to take what is nearby and together with LITE cook create your own culinary masterpiece.
about_page.step_1_desc: Specify the products you have at home. The system will suggest options with similar names.
about_page.step_2_desc: The algorithm will select the best recipes based on your ingredients and filters.
about_page.step_3_desc: Step-by-step instructions with clear proportions. Save recipes and plan a menu for the week.

privacy_page.data_1_p: The LITE cook service collects certain user data to ensure the platform works correctly and to provide a personalized experience.
privacy_page.data_2_p: While using the site, we may collect the following data:
privacy_page.data_2_li4: Information about interactions with the site (searches, viewed recipes)
privacy_page.data_2_li5: Device data (browser type, operating system, IP address)
privacy_page.data_4_p: Providing personal data is voluntary, but without it, some site functions may be unavailable.
privacy_page.usage_2_p: We may use your email to:
privacy_page.usage_4_p: We do not use your data for sale to third parties or for aggressive advertising.
privacy_page.cook_1_p: Cookies are small text files stored on your device while using the site.
privacy_page.cook_4_li1: change cookie settings in your browser
privacy_page.cook_4_p2: Please note: disabling cookies may affect site functionality.
privacy_page.ctrl_1_p: Every user has the right to:
privacy_page.ctrl_2_p: A user can delete their account at any time through profile settings or by contacting support.
privacy_page.ctrl_2_li1: personal data will be deleted or anonymized
privacy_page.ctrl_4_p: We reserve the right to change this Policy. Updates are published on this page.
privacy_page.full_intro: Welcome to LITE cook! We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it.
privacy_page.full_1_p: We may collect the following types of information:
privacy_page.full_1_li4_d: viewed recipes, selected ingredients, search queries
privacy_page.full_3_p: We apply modern technical and organizational measures to protect your data:
privacy_page.full_3_p2: We do not share your personal data with third parties without your consent, except as required by law.
privacy_page.full_4_p2: You can change cookie settings in your browser.
privacy_page.full_5_p2: To do this, contact us using the information below.
privacy_page.full_6_p: We may update this Privacy Policy. All changes will be published on this page.
privacy_page.full_7_p: If you have questions about this Policy, contact us:

profile_page.delete_avatar_desc: Your avatar will be permanently deleted.
profile_page.footer_note: We will automatically hide recipes that contain these ingredients and personal restrictions.
profile_page.advice1_title: How to store greens in the fridge: 3 simple ways
profile_page.advice1_p1: Place stems of greens (dill, parsley, cilantro) in a glass of cold water. Cover with a plastic bag on top.
profile_page.advice1_p2: Put dry greens in a zip-lock bag, let the air out, and close. You can put a paper napkin inside to control moisture.
profile_page.advice1_p3: Storage in cloth: Wrap the greens in a clean, slightly moistened waffle towel and put them in a bag or container.
profile_page.advice2_title: Which pan to choose for an induction cooker
profile_page.advice2_p1: Look for products made of cast iron, stainless steel, or aluminum with a special steel insert.
profile_page.advice2_p2: It should be perfectly flat, smooth, and fit tightly to the surface. Optimal thickness is 3-5 mm to avoid deformation when heated.
profile_page.advice2_p3: The bottom diameter should match the burner size (at least 12 cm), otherwise the stove may not "see" the pan.
profile_page.advice2_p4: If in doubt, attach a regular magnet to the bottom - if it sticks, the pan is suitable.
profile_page.advice3_title: Chocolate instead of a doctor: healing properties of dark chocolate
profile_page.advice3_subtitle: Main healing properties of dark chocolate:
profile_page.advice3_p1: Flavonoids relax blood vessels, improve blood flow, and lower blood pressure. Regular consumption can reduce the risk of coronary heart disease and stroke.
profile_page.advice3_p2: Chocolate stimulates the production of endorphins and serotonin ("happiness hormones"), helping to reduce stress and improve mood.
profile_page.advice3_p3: Cocoa improves blood supply to the brain, which is useful for cognitive functions.
profile_page.advice3_p4: High antioxidant content protects cells from oxidative stress.
profile_page.advice3_p5: A small amount of dark chocolate 15-20 minutes before a meal can reduce hunger.
